note: pr-review = reviewer side of the PR flow: fetch the PR diff and post a GitHub review (summary + inline comments). Distinct from pr-create (author opens the PR), task-fix-pr (turn review comments into code), code-review (local read-only pre-commit), and the sec-* scanners (security-only). mock_rate encodes the ideal outcome for --decider mock; real deciders ignore it.

queries.text: review PR #214 and leave comments
can you do a code review on the pull request for my branch?
marvin review PR 87 — look for bugs, perf issues, and security stuff and post inline comments
my teammate opened a PR against dev, go review it and request changes if anything looks off
start a PR review on the current branch's pull request and submit it to github
leave review comments on PR 142, be specific about the null handling in the api handler
give the open pull request a proper review pass and post it — correctness, error handling, tests
review my coworker's PR, approve it if it's clean otherwise comment
do a review of PR #9 and anchor the findings to the changed lines
our lead asked me to review this pull request before merge — check the diff and drop inline notes
open a pull request for this branch with a description and checklist
queries.note: author side → pr-create, not reviewing an existing PR

queries.text: address the review comments on my PR and push the fixes
review my staged changes locally before I commit, don't post anything to github
queries.note: local read-only pre-commit review → code-review / sec-gate, no GitHub post

queries.text: explain how the diff in this PR actually works, walk me through the logic
queries.note: understanding code → explain, not a review verdict

queries.text: the CI check on this PR is failing, help me figure out why
run a full security scan of the code in this PR for OWASP issues
queries.note: dedicated security audit → sec-scan, not a general PR review

queries.text: merge PR #55 once the checks are green
queries.note: merge op → pr-merge / plain gh, not reviewing

queries.text: reply to the reviewer's comment thread on PR 30 and resolve it
queries.note: responding to/closing threads → task-fix-pr, not authoring a new review

queries.text: summarize what changed in this PR for the release notes
check the Terraform and Dockerfile in this PR for misconfigurations
review the pull request I just created and post the review on github
queries.note: shares 'pull request' with pr-create but the action is to review an existing PR, not open one

queries.text: look over the PR diff for bugs and leave inline review comments on github
queries.note: must beat code-review — the GitHub-posting review is pr-review's job, not the local read-only pass

queries.text: review my current working diff for bugs before I push, don't touch github
queries.note: local read-only pre-commit review → /code-review; pr-review posts to GitHub, so it must abstain here

queries.text: open a pull request for my feature branch and fill in the description
queries.note: must lose to pr-create — authoring/opening the PR, not reviewing one
